Home/Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

We respect your privacy. This page explains exactly what data we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it — no jargon, no surprises.

Last updated: May 26, 2026
The Prime Crafters
aman@theprimecrafters.com
Introduction

Our Commitment
to Your Privacy

At The Prime Crafters, we believe trust is the foundation of every client relationship. We are committed to protecting the privacy of every visitor, prospect, and client who interacts with us — whether through our website, contact forms, or consultations.

Any information you share with us is handled with care, used only for the purposes it was provided, and never sold to third parties. This policy explains exactly what we collect, why we collect it, and how we protect it.

Data Protection
Secure storage & access controls
Never Sold
Your data stays with us
Full Transparency
Clear policies, no fine print surprises
Your Rights
Access, update, or delete anytime
Data Collection

Information We Collect

We only collect what's genuinely needed — nothing more. Select a category below to learn what applies.

Direct Input

Information You Provide

When you fill out a contact form, book a consultation, or get in touch with us, you may share:

  • Full name and email address
  • Phone number and company name
  • Website URL and service interest
  • Project details, messages, and any files you submit
Data Usage

How We Use
Your Information

Your data is used only for the purposes listed below. We do not use it for advertising, profiling, or unrelated third-party activities.

Privacy & Transparency

Your data is used carefully, securely, and only when necessary.

We believe privacy should feel transparent — not hidden behind complicated systems. Every piece of information shared with The Prime Crafters is used solely to improve communication, support, automation, and service delivery.

We never use your data for advertising or third-party marketing. Information shared with us is strictly used to deliver, improve, and support the services you request from The Prime Crafters.

01

Respond to Inquiries

We use your contact details to reply to questions, follow up on form submissions, and keep communication flowing.

02

Schedule Consultations

Booking data helps us confirm calls, send reminders, and prepare for your discovery session.

03

Prepare Proposals

Project details you share allow us to scope your requirements and put together accurate, tailored proposals.

04

Improve Our Website

Analytics data helps us understand what's working, fix issues, and make the site faster and more useful for everyone.

05

Deliver AI Automation Services

Client project data is used exclusively to build, test, and deploy the AI systems you've engaged us for.

06

Support Existing Clients

We retain relevant information to assist with ongoing projects, answer support questions, and maintain service continuity.

07

Prevent Misuse

Technical and usage data helps us detect fraud, spam, or abuse and protect the integrity of our systems and clients.

Privacy Policy

How We Share Information

We respect your data. The Prime Crafters does not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third party — ever. Information is shared only in the limited, specific circumstances described below.

Your data is never sold. We share information only when it is strictly necessary to deliver our services, comply with the law, or protect the rights and security of our users and systems.

Trusted Service Providers

To operate our website and deliver AI automation services, we work with carefully selected third-party tools and platforms. These providers may process your data solely to support the services we offer — they are not permitted to use your information for any other purpose.

This may include providers across the following categories:

Hosting & infrastructureAnalytics & tag managementCRM & schedulingEmail & communicationPayment processingSecurity & monitoringAutomation tools

Legal or Security Requirements

In certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your information to comply with applicable laws or regulations, respond to lawful requests from public authorities, prevent or investigate potential fraud or abuse, or protect the rights, property, and safety of The Prime Crafters, our clients, or the public.

Any such disclosure will be limited strictly to what is necessary under the circumstances.

Tracking & Analytics

Cookies & Analytics

Our website uses cookies — small text files stored on your device — to keep the site functional and to help us understand how people use it. We keep this minimal and transparent.

Essential CookiesRequired

Required for the website to function. They enable core features like page navigation and security.

e.g.Session tokens, CSRF protection
Analytics CookiesOptional

Help us understand how visitors interact with the site — which pages are visited, how long, and where traffic comes from.

e.g.Google Analytics (_ga, _gid)
Marketing & Tag CookiesOptional

Set by tools like Google Tag Manager to track campaign performance and manage third-party scripts.

e.g.Google Tag Manager (_gtm)
Control Your Cookies
Manage via your browser settings
Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and other site data
Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
Settings → Cookies and Site Permissions → Cookies

Disabling analytics cookies won't affect site functionality. You can also opt out of Google Analytics tracking at any time via Google's opt-out tool.

Privacy Policy

Data Security

Keeping your data safe is a responsibility we take seriously. We apply appropriate security safeguards across our systems, processes, and tools to help protect the information you share with us.

No system is completely risk-free

While we work hard to protect your information, no method of electronic transmission or storage can be guaranteed 100% secure. We remain committed to responding quickly and transparently in the unlikely event of a security incident.

If you have concerns regarding your data security, contact us immediately and we’ll address them as a priority.

Reasonable Safeguards

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

Limited Access

Access to your personal information is restricted only to team members and providers who genuinely need it.

Secure Tools

We prefer platforms that follow strong security practices including encryption, access controls, and regular audits.

Privacy Policy

Data Retention

We only keep your information for as long as it is genuinely needed. Once data has served its purpose, we delete or anonymise it in a responsible and timely manner.

Minimum necessary, maximum care. We do not hold on to data longer than required. Retention periods are determined by the purpose for which the data was collected and any applicable legal obligations.

Inquiries & Consultations

Data submitted through contact forms or discovery calls is kept while your inquiry is active and for a reasonable period afterward.

Service Delivery

Client data shared for AI automation projects, workflow builds, or implementations is retained throughout the engagement and for a period after project completion.

Client Records

We maintain records necessary to support ongoing client relationships, document decisions, and provide continuity of service.

Legal & Accounting Obligations

Certain data must be retained to comply with applicable laws, tax regulations, or contractual obligations — even after a project has ended.

Security & Dispute Handling

Where needed to prevent fraud, resolve disputes, or enforce our agreements, relevant records may be kept for a longer period.

When data is no longer needed, we securely delete or anonymise it so that it can no longer be associated with you. You may also request deletion at any time — see our Your Privacy Rights section for details.

Privacy Policy

Your Privacy
Rights

You have meaningful rights over the personal data we hold about you. We are committed to honouring those rights clearly, securely, and without unnecessary friction.

Rights available to you may vary depending on your location and applicable privacy regulations such as GDPR, CCPA, or PDPA.

Access, Update, or Delete Your Information

To exercise any privacy right, simply contact us directly. We respond within a reasonable timeframe and may verify your identity before processing requests to protect your data.

Submit a Privacy Request

Have questions about your rights? Contact us anytime for assistance regarding your personal data.

Access Your Data

Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you and understand how it is processed.

Correct Your Data

Ask us to update or correct any inaccurate or incomplete information we may hold.

Delete Your Data

Request deletion of your information where retention is not legally required.

Opt Out of Marketing

You can unsubscribe from marketing communication at any time.

Privacy Policy

Third-Party
Links & Tools

Our website may contain links to external websites, embedded tools, scheduling pages, payment platforms, or other third-party services. These are provided for convenience — but their privacy practices remain outside our direct control.

We are not responsible for third-party privacy practices. Once you leave our website or interact with an embedded service, the privacy policy of that provider governs how your information is handled.

A link to a third-party platform does not imply endorsement of that provider or its privacy standards.

Linked Websites

Our website may contain links to external websites, blogs, or resources that we reference for your convenience.

Partner sitesIndustry resourcesReference articles

Scheduling & Booking

We may use third-party scheduling tools to allow you to book discovery calls or consultations directly.

CalendlyCal.comGoogle Calendar

Payment Platforms

Any payments are processed through secure third-party payment providers. We do not store your payment card details.

StripePayPalCheckout platforms

Embedded Tools & Widgets

Some pages may embed third-party tools such as chatbots, forms, or interactive widgets to enhance functionality.

Chat widgetsForm buildersAI tools

Privacy Policy

Policy Updates & Privacy Contact

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our services, technology, or legal obligations. When we do, we will always post the revised version on this page.

How We Handle Updates

  • Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date
  • Material changes may be communicated directly to active clients
  • Continued use of our website after updates constitutes acceptance
  • You can request a summary of changes by contacting us directly

Reach Out About Privacy

  • Ask how your data is collected or used
  • Request access, correction, or deletion of your data
  • Opt out of any communications
  • Report a privacy concern or potential data incident
  • Get clarification on any part of this policy
Contact Us

Last updated: May 2025

Thank you for taking the time to read our Privacy Policy. Your trust matters to us. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to get in touch.

PrimeCrafters

Transforming businesses through intelligent AI automation. We deliver proven results with cutting-edge technology and dedicated expertise.
